description: Lighting setup for BiomeB stone ruins area at X=50000, Y=50000

directional_light.label: Sun_Main
directional_light.note: CRITICAL: pitch MUST be negative. Positive pitch = black screen (sun points at sky).

post_process.note: AEM_MANUAL prevents black screen from auto-exposure over-darkening.

point_lights.label: PillarLight_A
point_lights.purpose: Warm amber torch glow at base of stone pillar A — tactical shadow coverage

point_lights.label: PillarLight_B
point_lights.purpose: Warm amber torch glow at base of stone pillar B — tactical shadow coverage

point_lights.label: PillarLight_C
point_lights.purpose: Warm amber torch glow at base of stone pillar C — tactical shadow coverage

design_intent.emotional_tone: Danger and discovery — player enters ancient ruin zone, warm pillar lights create navigational beacons against cool ambient Lumen GI
design_intent.gameplay_function: Tactical shadow coverage from pillars creates ambush zones for dinosaur AI and player stealth
design_intent.cinematography_reference: Roger Deakins — light as meaning, not decoration. Each pillar light marks a point of interest and creates depth contrast.

pending_lighting.label: CaveEntrance_SpotLight
pending_lighting.purpose: Dramatic backlit silhouette for cave entrance — player sees danger zone clearly

pending_lighting.label: WallSlab_RimLight
pending_lighting.purpose: Rim lighting on wall slab to define silhouette against sky
